[vc_column_text]

Hood Builder is one of the leading providers of engineering and surveying services to clients in a variety of industries nationwide. Our experienced and friendly engineers and designers will bring your vision to life while making your satisfaction their top priority.

[/vc_column_text]

[/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column]
[/vc_column][vc_column offset=”vc_col-lg-7 vc_col-md-7″][vc_column_text]

Structural Engineering Services

The design of the foundational structure and the load-bearing elements of a building requires deep expertise. Before the construction of a commercial restaurant or building begins, a team of structural engineers designs the ‘bones’ of a facility to ensure sustainability and energy efficiency. These professionals do not only have expertise in viable support system design, but they also have familiarity with a range of codes and regulatory guidelines. If you are planning to construct a new commercial building or remodel an existing facility, you should always seek the help of a highly competent team of structural engineers.

What the eyes see is the appearance of the building. Behind this remains hidden the supporting structure, which includes the foundation, beams, columns, walls, slabs, and many other elements to hold up the weight. Structural engineering plays a crucial role in giving a building the supporting strength it needs to stand the test of time. Make sure you get this project done by expert professionals.

Hood Builder: Your Most Trusted Structural Engineering Partner

Hood Builder is one of the leading providers of engineering and surveying services to clients in a variety of industries nationwide. Our experienced and friendly engineers and designers will bring your vision to life while making your satisfaction their top priority. While you have our team of experts by your side, you will never have to worry about a thing that the entire process involves.

Equipped with comprehensive design experience and deep knowledge of local industry standards, we help a wide range of clients in accomplishing preliminary and detailed structural engineering projects in a professional manner. Innovative thinking, consistent training, and deep research are some of the key drivers that make our engineering and design services one of their kind. Our structural engineering services follow international quality standards and aim to reduce project schedules while maintaining the budgetary needs of clients. Our experience ranges from small commercial facilities to large-scale structural projects. We provide each of our clients with smartly engineered structures using new-age methodologies.

We have locations across the country, so no matter where you are located, call Hood Builder and we will get to work quickly. Our engineers and designers can perform any service you require, and they work quickly with extreme attention to detail.

Full-Service Structural Engineering and Designing

  • Building design
  • Building performance analysis
  • Sustainability design
  • Condition assessments and rehabilitation
  • Project management
  • Property inspections
  • Land planning
  • Architectural services

For over 25 years, our engineers have been collaborating with building owners, architects, and builders to design premium solutions for projects of all types and sizes. Our team of seasoned professionals will use their combined years of experience and sophisticated tools to exceed your expectations.

Structural Analysis

This is a crucial part of a building construction project. Our team of experts will carry out an effective analysis of each element that comprises the overall structure of a commercial facility of building. Whether it is the columns, beams, walls or any other supporting structure, we will carefully review each of these and how they will behave when they undergo different kinds of forces.

Preliminary Structural Designs

Our structural engineers have multiple years of experience in the evaluation of a wide range of primary structural systems and select only those systems that will provide maximum support and strength to a building. The entire process involves creating the preliminary foundation layout, analyzing all the member sizes, and establishing the sizes that are most ideal for the project.
This is the stage where engineers select the general project location and come up with innovative design concepts on which to build upon. Our professionals will conduct the entire review process following the best standards of quality. From drawings and the assessment of floor vibration to identifying cost elements in structural, our engineers will complete each stage carefully and provide architects with the correct input on various architectural elements. While good preliminary designs include all this, we will go the extra mile to deliver top-quality results.

Detailed Structural Designs

The structure is constructed needs to have stability and strength. The detailed design stage involves analyzing the rigidity of the structure based on the type and quality of materials used.

Our structural engineering team has a deep understanding of how different types of materials perform and selects the materials in accordance with the physical requirements of the building being constructed. They create the final design of all the structural elements involved, both primary and secondary. Whether it is the plan, elevations or sections, feel confident that our engineers’ team will define and design every detail including the connection forces, construction sequences, positions of control, and reinforcing in an accurate manner.

Design for Building Foundation System

For long-term stability, it is crucial to select the right type of foundation to support the building. That is why engineers need to consider a number of factors such as the location of the structure, type of structure, load magnitude, ground conditions, etc. In many site locations, the ground conditions are not favorable. Experts need to assess all of these and create a foundational design for the building in accordance with code compliance issues and seismic concerns.

Our experienced engineers and draftsmen will develop the most efficient design for a highly stable and strong foundation. They will complete the process while adhering to all the building codes and regulations.

Read More: Restaurant Remodel Tips: 10 Creative Tips you should know

 

Focused on Your Complete Satisfaction

We have worked with some of the biggest names in business today, including Starbucks, McDonald’s, and The Olive Garden. Like our other clients, you will begin to prefer us for the quality of work we provide, the affordability of our pricing, and the fact that we are your one-stop shop for structural engineering services.

We strive to provide you with solutions that will achieve your project’s schedule while meeting your cost or other complexity challenges. Our in-depth knowledge and experience make us industry leaders and your best choice for structural engineering. No job is too big or small, and you’ll remain confident that we are providing you with quality services every step of the way, from concept to construction and prompt delivery of all plans, reports, and inspections.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column offset=”vc_col-lg-offset-1 vc_col-lg-4 vc_col-md-offset-1 vc_col-md-4″][vc_wp_custommenu nav_menu=”12″ el_class=”wps-sidebar-related-links” title=”Related Links”]

Get a Free Quote

We’ve got you covered. Hood Builder is a leading distribution, fabrication, and installation company for food facilities of any size. We have offices and plants across the United States that are ready to tend to your needs.

If you intend on receiving quotes from other installers in the industry, please be sure to compare the items included in the package in addition to price and reputation. Our objective is to always be your obvious choice. Please fill out the form below and and we will prepare a quote.

For a Full and Fast price Quote, Contact Hood Builder today at 303-777-7720.
